overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a scenic grassland prairie. The character traverses a dirt path, passes through a tree line, and approaches a herd of bison grazing in the tall grass under a dramatic partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with dirt walking path

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along a dirt path through rolling grassland toward two distant oak trees

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
two prominent oak trees standing together on the horizon line
rolling green hills dotted with scattered trees
sparse trees dotting the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through rolling grassland. The path stretches ahead toward two prominent oak trees in the distance, with scattered trees dotting the hills under a dramatic cloudy sky.

events.description: passes under the canopy of the first large oak tree, temporarily obscuring the sky
emerges from between the two oak trees back into open prairie

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tall grass between the trunks of two large oak trees

entered.detail: dense tall grass flanking the path on both sides
overhead canopy of leaves from the oak trees creating dappled shade

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt path behind, walking through dense tall grass toward the two oak trees. Passing between the tree trunks, the canopy temporarily obscures the sky before opening back into the prairie.

events.description: herd of bison becomes visible grazing in the tall grass ahead
character walks into the middle of the bison herd, passing between grazing animals

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through a large herd of grazing bison in the open prairie

notable_agents.action: herd of bison grazing peacefully in the tall grass, scattered across the prairie

entered.detail: rocky formations visible on the distant horizon beyond the grassland

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the trees, the character enters a vast open prairie where a large herd of bison grazes. The character continues walking forward, approaching and then moving through the herd as the landscape stretches toward distant rock formations under the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured dirt path through a wooded transition and into a vast, wild prairie. It begins with the character walking along a winding trail that stretches toward two prominent oak trees under a dramatic, cloudy sky. As the character leaves the path, the camera moves through dense tall grass and passes between the dark trunks of the oaks, where the canopy briefly obscures the light. The scene then opens back into the wide expanse of the prairie, revealing a large herd of grazing bison. Finally, the camera continues forward, moving through the herd as the landscape extends toward distant rock formations on the horizon.
